title: Bump bundled krunkit to 0.1.2
body:
Bump the bundled krunkit version from 0.1.1 to 0.1.2.

Fixes: #23194

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

None yet, as this is a fix for a feature that isn't present in a release.

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Somewhat related, the way we just bump version in the installer without testing them in CI concerns me. I don't think CI is using any of these versions which means it is possible that we include broken versions in the installer and not notice.

@baude @ashley-cui Not sure if you have considered this or if I am missing something?
